allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/dreams/analyze -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text": "I was flying over mountains"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/dreams/analyze -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text": "I was flying over purple mountains"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/dreams/analyze -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text": "I was in my childhood home but the walls were made of purple velvet and I could not find my keys"}')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; paths=json.load\(sys.stdin\).get\('paths',{}\); print\('\\n'.join\(k for k in paths if 'soundscape' in k\)\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/audio/soundscape-menu -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Authorization: Bearer test' -d '{"custom_prompt": "rain on a window"}')
